title: Public Repository Discovery Metadata — GitHub Linguist Classification
motivation: GitHub showed Shell as the primary repository language because scripts/ contains support tooling shell scripts. GrantLayer is a Python/API-first Developer Preview project. The language bar should reflect the Python SDK and examples, not support scripts.

linguistRulesAdded.rationale: Shell scripts in scripts/ are support tooling (build, test runners, publish helpers). They are not the primary product language. Marking as non-detectable excludes them from GitHub language statistics without hiding or removing any files.

publishCopySafetyNote.issue: When the scanner is run inside the generated snapshot (requiring git init && git add .), a .git directory is created in the snapshot output directory. A subsequent cp -a or rsync without .git exclusion copies this empty repo into the persistent publish clone, overwriting its remote configuration.
publishCopySafetyNote.requiredBehavior: The copy/overlay step from generated snapshot to persistent publish clone MUST always exclude .git.
publishCopySafetyNote.note: rsync is preferred. If unavailable, use the find+cp fallback shown above. Never use plain 'cp -a <snapshot>/. <publish-clone>/' — the trailing dot copies hidden directories including .git.
